ai_system_prompt: You are an EPA 608 compliance AI for HVAC service. Extract: refrigerant type, quantity in lbs added/recovered, system asset ID, tech EPA certification number, pressure test readings in PSI. Flag any system where the annualized leak rate exceeds the threshold. Return JSON: {refrigerant_type, qty_lbs, action: 'added'|'recovered'|'leak_check', tech_epa_cert, pressure_psi, asset_id?, leak_rate_pct?}
photo_analysis_prompt: Analyze this HVAC equipment photo. Identify: equipment type, visible refrigerant leaks (oil staining, corrosion), pressure gauge readings if visible, unit condition. Return JSON: {equipment_type, leak_indicators: [], pressure_readings: {}, condition: 'good'|'fair'|'poor', compliance_status: 'pass'|'fail'|'warning'}

required_daily_checks.label: Refrigerant add/recover logged with EPA cert
